hero.name: Bashar Hani
hero.sub: Crafting images that capture emotion, mood, and brand identity.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Behind the Lens
about.para1: A highly creative and passionate visual storyteller with strong skills in photography and videography, particularly in composition and lighting. Known for an instinctive eye for detail, dynamic framing, and a unique ability to craft visually compelling images that capture emotion, mood, and brand identity.
about.para2: Well-versed in the principles of the color wheel, styling, and visual harmony, with a deep understanding of how color, texture, and tone influence perception and aesthetics — and a strong awareness of how lighting can elevate both subject and setting, enhancing the narrative within the frame.

services.label: Services
services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: From product campaigns to cinematic portraits, every frame is crafted with intention.

items.title: Product Photography
items.desc: Studio and lifestyle product shoots that highlight brand identity through precise lighting, composition, and color.

items.title: Portrait Photography
items.desc: Expressive portraits that reveal personality and emotion through dynamic framing and masterful use of light.

items.title: Cinematography
items.desc: Cinematic stills and motion content that translate brand stories into powerful visual narratives.

items.title: Brand Visual Content
items.desc: End-to-end visual content creation aligned with brand strategy for campaigns, social media, and editorial.

work.label: Work
work.title: Selected Work
work.subtitle: A curated selection of photography and cinematography projects.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Create Together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk about how we can bring your vision to life.
